content.description: No code changes required. The failing assessment (220337Z) found 8 old staged-transcript artifacts missing the body field — artifacts created before the cmd_capture_transcript fix at d06656c. The code fix is already in place (jq --rawfile embeds body). Those old artifacts were replaced by subsequent session runs; all 8 currently staged transcripts have the body field. All six invariants (hook registration, agent-type filtering, artifact CLI routing, body presence, primary/precompact capture-type semantics) are satisfied by the current implementation.
